cycleContext.note: June 2 scan (24-hour window since June 1). Key: (1) Iran: continued execution surge, Marefati at imminent risk, 600+ YTD, NCRI June 2 brief; (2) DRC/Uganda Ebola: 321/48 DRC, Uganda 15 including Kampala, PHEIC active; (3) Hungary: constitutional amendment process ongoing; (4) Sudan lean season: EWN June 2 analysis, 19.5M food insecure; (5) Oracle WARN Act: June 15 deadline 13 days away; (6) EU migration deal June 1-2: return hubs, 2-year detention, home searches, Germany deporting to Afghanistan/Syria; (7) Meta MCI employee tracking backlash June 1; (8) Afghanistan: Taliban Decree No. 18 confirmed by UN Women; (9) Ethiopia elections June 1 with conflict; (10) xAI/Grok: SE Asia bans holding, Pentagon classified integration; (11) EU AI Act enforcement 61 days away; (12) Somalia: 6M food insecure, 15.2% HNRP funded.
